name: Call-Of-Doodie
currentFocus: Execution-quality refinement remains the core track, but the pacing slice is now shipped: the next in-repo focus is combat readability, stronger front-door guidance, and trust/coaching follow-through while human-only launch blockers stay external.
nextMilestone: Land the next refinement tranche after wave pacing: combat readability, stronger front-door guidance, and richer trust/coaching signals without regressing the deployable build or protocol surfaces.
